brief_notes: Strong paper presenting RosettaVS with detailed benchmark tables showing specific numerical comparisons against competitors on CASF-2016 and DUD. The prospective hit discovery campaigns (KLHDC2 and NaV1.7) provide compelling real-world validation with IC50 values, confidence intervals, and crystallographic confirmation. The combined hit discovery summary table is effective. Methods are thorough. The high hit rates (14% and 44%) are impressive and well-documented.
